description: Upgrade plan to migrate project to latest LTS versions

tasks.description: Upgrade to Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4
tasks.requirements: Upgrade JDK to 21, Spring Boot to 3.4, Spring Framework to 6.x, and migrate javax.* to jakarta.* if needed. Update all related Spring dependencies (Spring Security, Spring Data, etc.) to versions compatible with Spring Boot 3.4. Ensure compatibility with Java 21 language features and deprecated API removals.
tasks.summary: Upgraded Java from 8 to 21, Spring Boot from 2.7.18 to 3.4.3 (Spring Framework 6.2.x), migrated javax.persistence.* and javax.validation.constraints.* to jakarta.* in Photo.java, and updated Dockerfile base images to eclipse-temurin:21. Build passed and unit tests passed.
